use_cases: Hero section headline that cycles through value propositions with glitch animation
Animated landing page title that morphs between feature highlights
Portfolio website tagline with typewriter-like character morphing effect
SaaS product hero with rotating messaging or tagline animation
Interactive headline for creative agency websites
ai_summary: A React text animation component that morphs between an array of strings with a glitchy character-by-character transition effect. Features configurable intervals, hover-triggered glitch effects, and smooth state management. Used as a dynamic hero headline component for landing pages and marketing sites seeking animated, attention-grabbing typography.
